info.name: NearProp User Collection
info.description: Comprehensive collection of all user APIs for NearProp platform, organized in a logical flow from authentication to property management, interactions, and user profile operations.

request.description: Register a new user
Login with mobile number to receive OTP

exec: // Store the OTP identifier for verification

request.description: Verify OTP to complete login

request.description: Get details of a specific property
Search for properties with various filters

exec: // If we have properties, store the first property ID for later use

body.raw:
{
    "title": "3BHK Apartment in Premium Society",
    "description": "Spacious 3BHK apartment with modern amenities",
    "type": "RESIDENTIAL",
    "propertyType": "APARTMENT",
    "price": 4500000,
    "area": 1800,
    "bedrooms": 3,
    "bathrooms": 2,
    "address": {
        "addressLine1": "123 Premium Society",
        "addressLine2": "Sector 42",
        "city": "Indore",
        "state": "Madhya Pradesh",
        "postalCode": "452001",
        "country": "India",
        "latitude": 22.7196,
        "longitude": 75.8577
    },
    "amenities": ["PARKING", "SWIMMING_POOL", "GYM", "SECURITY"],
    "images": []
}

request.description: Add a property to user's favorites
Remove a property from user's favorites

Get all properties in user's favorites

body.raw:
{
    "propertyId": {{propertyId}},
    "rating": 4,
    "comment": "Great property with excellent amenities.",
    "pros": "Spacious, well-maintained, good neighborhood",
    "cons": "Slightly far from main market"
}

request.description: Create a new review for a property

body.raw:
{
    "propertyId": {{propertyId}},
    "rating": 5,
    "comment": "Absolutely fantastic property, even better than expected.",
    "pros": "Spacious, well-maintained, good neighborhood, excellent security",
    "cons": "Slightly far from main market"
}
